title: [MTR/NTE]Taiwan Railway Corp.EMU3000 Pack
description: Resource pack that adds Taiwan Railway Corp. EMU3000 into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
Resource pack that adds Taiwan Railway Corp. EMU3000 into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.

## Precautions:
The seats is designed that it will only appear on route.

It is only tested on fabric version of MTR mod. It will might not work on forge versions. You will need to download NTE version 0.5.0(or above) to work!

You are free to repaint the trains and modify them without permission, but you need to contact me if you want to publish your remixes, or add remixes inside another resourcepack!

Feel free to add it into your private server resourcepack.

You may not use any files in this pack and claim it as your own.

You may not publish this pack without modification.

You may not copy the sound or script file into another pack (but using resource path to this pack is ok.)

## Credits:
- Body+Interior+Display: UKRail 
> - X: @ukguk,

- Sound recordings: Yumekawa
